summary: Role 2 round 2 reviewed P0-04 direct MCP parity in revised consensus plan. Verdict: AGREE for plan strength; implementation remains needs_recheck until proof ingestion and real client canaries are built.
decisions: P0-04 acceptance tests are strong enough as a plan because they require real Codex and Claude client exact single-name discovery, successful calls for os_begin_task/search_memory/wiki_search/finish_task, proof-source exclusions, stale/negative tests, health/goal linkage, and Observatory visibility.

Current implementation/status are still not complete: client-mcp-direct-status.ts emits placeholder needs_recheck reports and data client_mcp_direct_status.json has zero verified tools and no proof paths.
next_steps: Implement proof artifact ingestion for status:mcp-direct.
Add real Codex and Claude direct MCP canaries and negative fixtures.
Wire verified/stale/missing direct MCP proof into verify:goal, status:health, and Observatory.
